mapper.select: SELECT member_id,login_id,name,email,phone,isadmin,TO_CHAR(regdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS dbday FROM Member ORDER BY member_id OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT member_id,login_id,name,email,address,content,phone,isadmin,status, TO_CHAR(regdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AS dbday FROM Member WHERE member_id=#{member_id}
